positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a wise, anthropomorphic forest creature (like a fox or raven) sitting amidst deep, vibrant bioluminescent foliage. The style is clean, vector-graphic, and inspired by vintage natural history books and modern linocut prints. The composition features a strong central silhouette of the creature against a dramatic, darkly contrasting background of luminous emerald and sapphire greens, accented by gold foil accents on the leaves. Emphasize stark contrasts and graphic depth, perfect for a central apparel print. Concept: 'Whispers of the Wild.'
